key_finding: All models avoided direct hallucination on T1 and T3. The critical differentiator was T2 — statistical fabrication under uncertainty. Claude and Perplexity refused to construct numbers. ChatGPT built a proxy without sufficient clarity. Grok labeled inference but was overconfident. Gemini cited an unverifiable source.
